name: Syncly
long_description: Syncly is an AI-native social listening platform that analyzes social content from text to video. Syncly extracts content, creator, and consumer insights from audio, visuals, and on-screen context, not just captions and comments, across TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, and more. From enterprise leaders like Kimberly-Clark and Clorox to fast-growing brands like Neuro, teams use Syncly to get full visibility across every social channel and make faster, smarter decisions.
one_liner: Social listening for the video era
